lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਮਿਲੁ ਸਖੀ ਗੁਣ ਕਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਲੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਧੀਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mil mil sakhee gun kahu mere prabh ke le satigur kee mat dheer |3|
lines.english: Come, and join together, O my companions; let's sing the Glorious Praises of my God, and follow the comforting advice of the True Guru.. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਆਸ ਪੁਜਾਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਰੀਰ ॥੪॥੬॥ ਛਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kee har aas pujaavahu har darasan saant sareer |4|6| chhakaa 1 |
lines.english: Please fulfill the hopes of servant Nanak, O Lord; his body finds peace and tranquility in the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||4||6|| First set of six. ||
Raag Gond, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
The Creator listens, and the Creator sees.
He is the Creator of all, He is the Enjoyer of all. ||1||Pause||
The Creator is unseen, and the Creator is seen.
The Creator touches, and the Creator is detached. ||1||
The Creator forms, and the Creator destroys.
The Creator is the One who speaks, and the Creator is the One who understands.
The Creator comes, and the Creator also goes.
The Creator is absolute and without qualities; the Creator is related, with the most excellent qualities.
By Guru's Grace, Nanak looks upon all the same. ||2||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਗ ਧਾਰਹਿ ਸਾਸੁ ਲੇਖੈ ਲੈ ਤਉ ਉਧਰਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਲੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pag dhaareh saas lekhai lai tau udhareh har gun gaaeile |1|
lines.english: Your foot-steps and your breaths are numbered; only by singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord will you be saved. ||1||
Gond, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਕਿਓ ਮੀਨ ਕਪਿਕ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ਤੂ ਉਰਝਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਕੁਸੰਭਾਇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: faakio meen kapik kee niaaee too urajh rahio kusanbhaaeile |
lines.english: You are caught, like the fish and the monkey; you are entangled in the transitory world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਰਹਨ ਕਉ ਠਉਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਕਾਏ ਪਰ ਕੈ ਜਾਇਲੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: apane rehan kau tthaur na paaveh kaae par kai jaaeile |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You have found no place of rest for yourself; so why do you try to teach others? ||1||Pause||
O mind, reform yourself, and forsake your aimless wandering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮੈਗਲੁ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਰਸਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿਓ ਤੂ ਲਾਗਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਕੁਟੰਬਾਇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau maigal indree ras prerio too laag pario kuttanbaaeile |
lines.english: Like the elephant, driven by sexual desire, you are attached to your family.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਪੰਖੀ ਇਕਤ੍ਰ ਹੋਇ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਿਛੁਰੈ ਥਿਰੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਲੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau pankhee ikatr hoe fir bichhurai thir sangat har har dhiaaeile |2|
lines.english: People are like birds that come together, and fly apart again; you shall become stable and steady, only when you meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, in the Company of the Holy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਹੋਆ ਪੰਚ ਵਾਸਿ ਵੈਰੀ ਕੈ ਛੂਟਹਿ ਪਰੁ ਸਰਨਾਇਲੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: too hoaa panch vaas vairee kai chhootteh par saranaaeile |3|
lines.english: You have fallen under the power of the five thieves; escape is only possible in the Sanctuary of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਮੀਨੁ ਰਸਨ ਸਾਦਿ ਬਿਨਸਿਓ ਓਹੁ ਮੂਠੌ ਮੂੜ ਲੋਭਾਇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaise meen rasan saad binasio ohu mootthau moorr lobhaaeile |
lines.english: Like the fish, which perishes because of its desire to taste, the fool is ruined by his greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵਉ ਦਾਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਾ ਮਿਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਇਲੇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: paavau daan sadaa daras pekhaa mil naanak daas dasaaeile |4|2|
lines.english: May I obtain the gift of always seeing the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan; meeting with You, Nanak is the slave of Your slaves. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਸਭਿ ਤੁਮੑਰੇ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤਾਇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal deen dukh bhanjan sabh tumare jeea jantaaeile |
lines.english: Be Merciful to me, O Destroyer of the pains of the meek; all beings and creatures belong to You.
Raag Gond, Fifth Mehl, Chau-Padhay, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
and infused His Light into the dust;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਤਨ ਕਉ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਭੋਜਨ ਭੋਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: baratan kau sabh kichh bhojan bhogaae |
lines.english: He exalted you and gave you everything to use, and food to eat and enjoy
He fashioned the soul and the breath of life,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤਜਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਕਤ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so prabh taj moorre kat jaae |1|
lines.english: - how can you forsake that God, you fool! Where else will you go? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਸੁਝੈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur te sujhai niranjan dev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru, one understands the Immaculate, Divine Lord. ||1||Pause||
Commit yourself to the service of the Transcendent Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee gat mit kahee na jaae |
lines.english: His state and condition cannot be described.
He creates and destroys in an instant;
He created plays and dramas of all sorts;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਅੰਤ ਗੁਨਾ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਕੇਤਕ ਗਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: beant gunaa taa ke ketak ganee |
lines.english: His Glorious Virtues are infinite; how many of them can I count?
The unchanging Lord does not come or go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so prabh man mere sadaa dhiaae |2|
lines.english: Meditate forever on that God, O my mind. ||2||
